name: The Back 9
about: The Back 9 is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Rochester, IL, offering state-of-the-art golfing experiences. It provides access to a variety of renowned PGA courses in a comfortable clubhouse setting, making it suitable for various needs such as competition, entertainment, lessons, and practice. The venue also includes a full bar and arcade games, creating a social atmosphere beyond just golfing.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to precise replicas of famous PGA courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
All-weather golfing available in a comfortable indoor environment
Comprehensive amenities including a full bar and arcade games for entertainment

faq.answer: The information does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own.

faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar, but information regarding outside food and drink is not provided.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes.

faq.answer: Yes, The Back 9 is kid-friendly as they offer arcade games available for kids of all ages.
